2603.17368.title: Towards Safer Large Reasoning Models by Promoting Safety Decision-Making before Chain-of-Thought Generation
2603.17368.paper_summary: Large reasoning models (LRMs) achieved remarkable performance via chain-of-thought (CoT), but recent studies showed that such enhanced reasoning capabilities are at the expense of significantly degraded safety capabilities. In this paper, we reveal that LRMs' safety degradation occurs only after CoT is enabled, and this degradation is not observed when CoT is disabled. This observation motivates us to consider encouraging LRMs to make safety decisions before CoT generation. To this end, we propose a novel safety alignment method that promotes the safety decision-making of LRMs before starting CoT generation. Specifically, we first utilize a Bert-based classifier to extract safety decision signals from a safe model (e.g., a CoT-disabled LRM) and then integrate these signals into LRMs' safety alignment as auxiliary supervision. In this way, the safety gradients can be backpropagated to the LRMs' latent representations, effectively strengthening the LRMs' safety decision-making abilities against CoT generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method substantially improves the safety capabilities of LRMs while effectively maintaining LRMs' general reasoning performance.
2603.17368.paper_summary_zh: 大型推理模型（LRMs）透過思維鏈（CoT）取得了顯著的表現，但最近的研究顯示，這種增強的推理能力是以安全能力顯著下降為代價的。<lb/>在本文中，我們揭示了LRMs的安全性下降僅在啟用CoT後發生，而在禁用CoT時並未觀察到這種下降。<lb/>這一觀察促使我們考慮在CoT生成之前鼓勵LRMs做出安全決策。<lb/>為此，我們提出了一種新穎的安全對齊方法，促進LRMs在開始CoT生成之前的安全決策。<lb/>具體而言，我們首先利用基於Bert的分類器從安全模型（例如，禁用CoT的LRM）中提取安全決策信號，然後將這些信號整合到LRMs的安全對齊中作為輔助監督。<lb/>這樣，安全梯度可以反向傳播到LRMs的潛在表示，有效增強LRMs在CoT生成過程中的安全決策能力。<lb/>大量實驗表明，我們的方法顯著提高了LRMs的安全能力，同時有效維持了LRMs的一般推理表現。
2603.17368.author: Jianan Chen et.al.
2603.17368.authors: Jianan Chen, Zhifang Zhang, Shuo He, Linan Yue, Lei Feng, Minling Zhang
